title: Enforce corelib api-shape tier coverage in beskid_tests

source.subject: feat(analysis,tests): enforce corelib api-shape tier coverage in beskid_tests

body:
`beskid_tests` enforces api-shape tier coverage so new corelib APIs cannot ship without an assigned tier tag.

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `compiler`
- **Commit:** [`53487b3`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid_compiler/commit/53487b3)
- **Subject:** feat(analysis,tests): enforce corelib api-shape tier coverage in beskid_tests
- **Completed:** 2026-05-23

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.3 (Macros, concurrency, and stabilization)
- **Workstream:** `stabilization`
- **Domain:** `core-library`
- **Deliverable:** `v03-merge-wave`

## Relation
Contributes to deliverable **v0.3 macro/runtime/ffi/tooling delivery** (`v03-merge-wave`).
